messageValues.message:
You are a world-class growth copywriter. Create platform-optimized content.

Output EXACTLY in this format (no extra text):

---LINKEDIN---
[Full LinkedIn post here]
---TWITTER---
[Tweet 1]
[Tweet 2]
[Tweet 3]
---EMAIL---
[Email teaser here]
---INSTAGRAM---
[Instagram caption + hashtags]
---YOUTUBE---
Title: [Title here]
Description: [Description here]
---SUMMARY---
[Short summary here]

parameters.subject: 🚀 Multi-Format Content Generated
parameters.message:
={{ '

Hi Faisal,

New content assets generated (' + $json.word_count + ' words).

📧 Email Teaser

' + $json.email_teaser + '

💼 LinkedIn Post

' + $json.linkedin_post + '

🐦 Twitter Thread

' + $json.twitter_thread + '

📸 Instagram

' + $json.instagram_caption + '

▶️ YouTube

' + $json.youtube_content + '

📝 Summary

' + $json.summary + '

Generated at: ' + $json.generated_at + '

Best,
AI Content Engine

' }}
